narration: Import argparse module and define the main entry point.
Instantiate an ArgumentParser object with a description.
Add a positional argument for pizza size with type string and choices from the sizes constant.
Add custom help text for the size argument.
Parse command line arguments using parser.parse_args().
Add a positional argument for pizza crust with type string and choices from the crusts constant.
Add an optional flag argument for extra cheese using store_true action and destination cheese.
Add an optional flag argument for extra sauce using store_true action and destination sauce.
Add an optional argument for toppings with nargs='+' to accept one or more values.
Update the build_pizza helper function to accept a namespace object instead of a dictionary.
Access pizza attributes from the namespace object (size, crust, cheese, sauce, toppings).
Print the final pizza order message using the parsed arguments.
Test the CLI with valid and invalid inputs to verify argument validation.
